arts.sum: Fixtures Young Boys Vs. Aston Villa - Tue, Sep 17th 2024, 18:45 Aston Villa trained at Stadion Wankdorf on Monday evening in preparation for their UEFA Champions League tie against BSC Young Boys. Unai Emery, his coaches and players took to the artificial pitch in Bern to go through their paces ahead of matchday one. Villa face the Swiss outfit for the first time in a competitive fixture, aiming to get off to a positive start in Europe’s elite club competition. You can view a gallery of training images below…

arts.ttl: 'Never shows up': National media now criticise £42m player for display on full debut after leaving Aston Villa
Youri Tielemans sends 'make our mark' message after revealing what Unai Emery told him in transfer talks
arts.sum: The Belgian has enjoyed an excellent start to the campaign and has played every minute of Villa's first four Premier League games so far. Youri Tielemans was in attendance at Aston Villa's pre-match press conference ahead of the Champions League clash against Young Boys on Tuesday night (5:45pm kick-off).

arts.ttl: Leon Bailey, plastic pitches and the 'higher risk' worrying Unai Emery
arts.sum: I’m excited, I think it’s a good moment for the club to play in the Champions League after a long time, hopefully we can keep it for a long time, that’s our challenge. "Be competitive like we are in the Premier League and the difficult to compete in the PL and similar in this competition because more or less the bet teams in the world are in the Champions League and the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery admits squad rotation increasingly likely in Champions League
arts.sum: Aston Villa head coach Unai Emery acknowledges that he must be open-minded with regards to squad rotation in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery urges Aston Villa to use tragic Gary Shaw death as Champions League motivation
arts.sum: Aston Villa are in mourning following the death of European Cup winning hero Gary Shaw aged just 63 - and Unai Emery wants his players to use the tragedy as motivation

arts.ttl: Youri Tielemans and Unai Emery make the same point about unique Aston Villa challenge
arts.sum: Unai Emery and Youri Tielemans insist Young Boys' artificial pitch isn't an excuse for Aston Villa not to perform in their first Champions League league phase fixture on Tuesday night. Villa flew into Switzerland earlier today to train on and get used to the plastic pitch at the Wankdorf Stadium ahead of the match against the Swiss Super League champions.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery will not let plastic pitch affect Villa’s performance at Young Boys
arts.sum: Villa will play in the premier European club competition for the first time in 41 years when they visit the Swiss champions on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery confirms 'good news' as Aston Villa handed injury boost
arts.sum: Speaking at his press conference before Villa's first Champions League league phase clash against Young Boys, Emery confirmed: "He is in the squad, we will train now and hopefully he will feel good and we’ll decide if he’s playing minutes or in the starting XI, but it’s good news." Villa will play six more games in all competitions across the next three weeks before the October international break.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery sends classy Gary Shaw message as Aston Villa dream of Champions League repeat
arts.sum: "Aston Villa Football Club is deeply shocked and profoundly saddened to learn that Gary Shaw, one of our European Cup-winning heroes, has passed away," a statement reads. Unai Emery has paid tribute to Aston Villa legend Gary Shaw, who has sadly passed away at the age of 63.
